Bash(node -e 'const d=require\("./job_scraper/seen_jobs.json"\); const s=d.seen; const k=Object.keys\(s\); console.log\("total seen:",k.length\); const recent=k.filter\(x=>s[x].first_seen>="2026-06-01"\); console.log\("seen since 2026-06-01:",recent.length\); const m={}; for\(const x of k\){const c=\(s[x].company||""\)+" | "+\(s[x].title||""\); m[c]=s[x].first_seen;} console.log\("--- distinct company|title \(most recent first_seen\) ---"\); Object.entries\(m\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>\(b[1]||""\).localeCompare\(a[1]||""\)\).slice\(0,60\).forEach\(\([c,f]\)=>console.log\(f,c\)\);')
